channel.title: Local AI Intel Brief
channel.description: Intelligence brief on local AI, on-device models, and edge computing developments.

channel.itunes:summary: Intelligence brief on local AI, on-device models, and edge computing developments.

item.description:
Hey there. Today's conversation is about where the real money is in AI services for small business right now—and it's not where most agencies think it is.
Let me set the scene. GoHighLevel is still the dominant platform, but here's what's interesting: it's not because everyone loves it. It's domina...

item.author: mediaverticals@proton.me
item.dc:creator: Future Scanner

item.description: Hey, thanks for tuning in. Today we're looking at the AI services marketplace—specifically what's happening with agencies selling AI solutions to small and medium-sized businesses. item.title: Local AI Intel Daily Brief — April 1, 2026

item.description: Hey, thanks for joining us. We're covering something that feels like a real inflection point in how agencies are building and selling AI solutions to local businesses. item.description:
